title: Icelogged Blocks
description: Adds frozen version of waterlogged blocks
body:
Adds frozen version of waterlogged blocks. Now waterlogged blocks can also freeze, like water freezes into normal ice. Frozen blocks store their block states and block entity data, could be obtained with Silk Touch.

Since 1.1.0 supports Frost Walker enchantment.
